overview: Out-value opponents through relentless graveyard recursion and card advantage, leveraging Lurrus to repeatedly cast cheap dredgers while disrupting the opponent's resources. Wins by out-graveyarding control, out-speeding aggro with early pressure, and out-valuing mirrors.
win_conditions: Griselbrand, repeated Arcanist activations, Psychic Frog bouncing, or overwhelming board state from graveyard recursion.

keep_criteria: Keep hands with 2-3 lands (preferably fetch/shock/mana dork), at least one dredger (Dreadhorde Arcanist, Griselbrand, or a cheap dredger), and discard/spell support.
mulligan_criteria: Mulligan on pure lands, multiple Lurrus without support, or hands missing early interaction.

early_game: Turn 1: Play a land, cast a mana dork (Llanowar Elves/Birds) or discard (Thoughtseize/Duress) to protect the plan.
Turn 2: Cast Arcanist or another dredger, or cast Lurrus if ahead.
Sequence mana dorks into Arcanist to start filling the graveyard.
Use fetches to shock for early damage if needed.
mid_game: Don't overcommit mana if opponent has sweepers.
Manage fetch lands carefully to avoid flooding.
Commit threats when opponent has no sweepers or counters.
Hold back if they have spot removal or board wipes.
Psychic Frog can bounce key threats to buy time.
late_game: Griselbrand, repeated Arcanist activations, Psychic Frog bouncing, or overwhelming board state from graveyard recursion.
When opponent has no graveyard hate, no sweepers, and you have Lurrus + 2+ dredgers in hand/graveyard.

sequencing_tips: Common mistakes: Overcommitting to Lurrus without backup threats, ignoring graveyard hate, mismanaging fetch lands, forgetting Psychic Frog's bounce timing.
Unique interactions: Lurrus can return dredgers from graveyard to hand.
Collector Ouphe shuts down artifact combos but is vulnerable to discard.
Ensure you have enough interaction to protect your engine.

matchups.advice: Use discard to remove counterspells. Cast threats in response to their spells. Use fetches to shock for damage to bypass counters if needed. Consider cheap threats or multiple threats.
Apply early pressure. Use discard to hit mana dorks. Graveyard hate if they rely on it. Out-value them with Lurrus recursion.
Early discard, spot removal, Psychic Frog bounce, graveyard hate if they use it. Stabilize with Lurrus engine.
Out-value them. Use discard to strip key answers. Pressure with multiple threats. Don't let them stabilize with sweepers.
Win the graveyard war. Use discard to remove their Lurrus/dredgers. Graveyard hate (Rest in Peace, Surgical). Out-value with better sequencing.

common_threats: Watch for graveyard hate (Rest in Peace, Leyline), sweepers (Supreme Verdict, Wrath of God), counters (Force of Will, Counterspell), and combo wincons.
Note when they tap out for interaction.
